steps.title: Read the graph directly
steps.content: This is a bar-graph lookup question. The vertical axis gives the number of times each color appears, so look for the bar whose height is $70$.

steps.title: Find the matching bar
steps.content: The bar at height $70$ is labeled Green. That means green appears $70$ times in the data set.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• Blue is about $27$, so A is too small.
  • Green is $70$, so B matches.
  • Red is about $33$, so C is too small.
  • Yellow is about $43$, so D is too small.
That confirms B.
